headline: How Is Microchip Technology's Stock Performance Compared to Other Semiconductor Stocks?
summary: Microchip Technology has underperformed its semiconductor peers over the past year. However, Wall Street analysts remain strongly optimistic about its prospects.

headline: A Look At Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation After Its Data Center Growth Forecast And AI Infrastructure Launch
summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) drew fresh attention after outlining a strong 2026 growth forecast for its Data Center Solutions Business Unit and launching PCIe 6.0 and CXL 3.1 retimers aimed at large-scale AI infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Microchip Technology. These data center announcements have arrived alongside a sharp shift in market sentiment, with Microchip’s share price gaining 48.7% over the past 90 days and its 1 year total shareholder return at 53.7%.
